tasks.description: Execute DTP-007 according to docs/planning artifacts and ralph prompt block

tasks.description: Execute DTP-009A according to docs/planning artifacts and ralph prompt block

tasks.description: Execute DTP-009B according to docs/planning artifacts and ralph prompt block
acceptance_criteria: Task DoD from prompt block is met

tasks.description: Execute DTP-010 according to docs/planning artifacts and ralph prompt block

tasks.description: Execute DTP-013B according to docs/planning artifacts and ralph prompt block
acceptance_criteria: Task DoD from prompt block is met
Verification commands pass
tasks.notes: DTP-013B completed: added authenticated GET /api/operator/home/summary with bounded response contract `{navigationCounts, systemStatus, criticalUnresolvedCount, activeTrackedPersonCount, recentUpdates, degradedSources}`, deterministic degraded override via OperatorHomeSummary:ForceDegradedSummary, canonical critical count sourced only through ResolutionReadProjectionService.BuildOperatorHomeSummaryReadModel, ordered degradedSources filtering, navigation counts for Resolution/Persons/Alerts/Offline Events only, and recentUpdates bounded to approved operator route allow-list with deterministic ordering/cap (<=5). Verified with dotnet build TelegramAssistant.sln.

tasks.description: Execute DTP-014 according to docs/planning artifacts and ralph prompt block
acceptance_criteria: Task DoD from prompt block is met
Verification commands pass
tasks.notes: DTP-014 completed: replaced static /operator home snapshot with live client-side summary rendering sourced from GET /api/operator/home/summary, kept navigation-first layout with Assistant as destination, mounted required dashboard markers (`home-system-status`, `home-critical-unresolved`, `home-active-persons`, `home-recent-updates`), rendered live counts for Resolution/Persons/Alerts/Offline Events, and enforced degraded behavior with `data-state='degraded'` for fetch failures and summary-degraded responses while preserving visible navigation links and section-level fallback content. Verified with dotnet build TelegramAssistant.sln.
